title: medicago edgeworthii
intro: Medicago edgeworthii, also known as Edgeworth's medick, is a perennial legume native to the Himalayas and parts of China. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Medicago edgeworthii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas and infusions, as well as tinctures and salves, which can be used to topical apply to skin conditions and wounds.
